title: erysimum ibericum
intro: Erysimum ibericum, also known as Iberian wallflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erysimum ibericum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
